name: Galus Labre
notes: A hired thug in Harlen's orbit who helps watch Vlen Backett and do dirty work.
playingNotes: Growl and hunch your shoulders. Move like the world is made of delicate glass and that you like breaking things.
You are terrified - not only have you been caught red-handed at a murder but you have also failed Ven Yasha.
You can try to hide your fear through bravado and aggression, or bargain for a way out.
Give the impression of barely-contained violence at all times.
